title: Pazhakulam punthalaveettil temple
tagline: Pazhakulam punthalaveettil temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Pazhakulam Punthalaveetil Temple is a Hindu temple in Pazhakulam neighbourhood in Pathanamthitta, Kerala in the peninsular India.
overview.description: Pazhakulam Punthalaveetil Temple is a Hindu temple in Pazhakulam neighbourhood in Pathanamthitta, Kerala in the peninsular India. This temple is a Shakti temple at Konni in Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Peringanadu
topPlaces.description: Peringanadu is a village in Pathanamthitta district, Kerala state, India. It is known by the presence of Peringanadu Trichenda Mangalam Mahadeva Temple.

topPlaces.name: Pallikkal, Adoor
topPlaces.description: Pallikkal is a village in Adoor taluk, Pathanamthitta district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Kendriya Vidyalaya, Adoor
topPlaces.description: Kendriya Vidyalaya, Adoor is a Higher Secondary School located in Adoor in the Indian state of Kerala. It operates I to XII grade with Science, Commerce and Computer Science streams in the senior secondary level.

topPlaces.name: Erathu
topPlaces.description: Erathu is a gram panchayat in Pathanamthitta district, Adoor Tehsil, Parakod Block in the state of Kerala, India. This panchayat covers the revenue entity of Erathu village and has an area of 21.74 km2.

topPlaces.name: Moonnalam
topPlaces.description: Moonnalam (Munnalam); is an urban area located in the Adoor Town in Kerala, India. Moonnalam comprises ward 25 and most of the area of ward 26 of the Adoor municipality.

topPlaces.name: Faith Theological Seminary, Manakala
topPlaces.description: Faith Theological Seminary, Manakala (FTS Manakala) is a Pentecostal theological seminary located in Manakala, Pathanamthitta, Kerala, India. It was founded in 1970 and is affiliated with the Senate of Serampore College (University).

topPlaces.name: Manakala
topPlaces.description: Manakala is a town in Pathanamthitta district, Kerala state, India. It is located in Adoor Thaluk.

topPlaces.name: Palamel
topPlaces.description: Palamel is a village in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is located 10 km south of Pandalam.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Pazhakulam punthalaveettil temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Pazhakulam punthalaveettil temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Pazhakulam punthalaveettil temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (80 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (80 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Pazhakulam punthalaveettil temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Pazhakulam punthalaveettil temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Pazhakulam punthalaveettil temple?
faq.a: Stays in Pazhakulam punthalaveettil temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Pazhakulam punthalaveettil temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Peringanadu, Pallikkal, Adoor, Kendriya Vidyalaya, Adoor, Erathu, Moonnalam.
